title.rendered: Commercial vs Residential Roofing: What’s the Difference?

content.rendered:
Are you in the process of building or renovating a property and wondering about the difference between residential and commercial roofing in Calgary? While they may seem similar at first glance, any roofing company in Calgary can tell you they have distinct differences. Learn about the distinctions here from the experts and understand the importance of choosing the right type of roofing for your project.

 

How Residential & Commercial Roofing in Calgary Differ 

 

Materials Used in Residential & Commercial Roofing in Calgary

One of the primary differences between commercial and residential roofing is the materials used. Residential roofing typically uses asphalt shingles, metal roofing, or tile. On the other hand, commercial roofing often uses materials such as modified bitumen, TPO, PVC, or EPDM. These materials are designed to withstand harsher weather conditions and provide better durability and longevity.

 

Design & Construction

Another difference between commercial and residential roofing is the design and construction of the roof. Residential roofing is often simpler in design and construction, with a pitched or sloped roof that allows for proper drainage. On the other hand, commercial roofing can be more complex and often features a flat or low-slope design. Flat roofs are more practical for commercial buildings, allowing for easy installation of HVAC units, solar panels, and other equipment.

 

Maintenance & Repairs

Commercial roofing also requires more maintenance and repairs than residential roofing. It’s due to the larger size of commercial roofs and the fact that they often have multiple layers and complex designs. Commercial roofs may also require frequent inspections and maintenance to ensure the proper functioning and prevent potential issues. Working with a professional commercial roofing company in Calgary is important to ensure that any maintenance or repairs are done correctly and efficiently.

 

Cost of Residential & Commercial Roofing in Calgary

The cost of commercial roofing is typically higher than residential roofing. That is due to the larger size and complexity of commercial roofs and the specialized materials and equipment required for installation. Additionally, maintenance and repairs can add up over time, making it important to work with professional commercial roofing companies in Calgary that can provide cost-effective solutions.

 

Choosing the Right Roofing for Your Project

When choosing between commercial and residential roofing, it’s important to consider your project’s specific needs and requirements. Residential roofing may be sufficient for smaller buildings or homes, while commercial roofing is essential for larger commercial properties. The location, climate, and intended use of the building should also be considered when choosing the type of roofing.

 

Working with a Professional Roofing Company

Working with a professional roofing company is essential no matter what type of roofing you choose. A professional company will have the expertise and experience to assess your needs, recommend the best type of roofing for your project, and provide high-quality installation, maintenance, and repairs. Regarding commercial roofing in Calgary, it’s particularly important to work with a company that specializes in commercial roofing and has a track record of success.

 

As you can see, while there are several differences between commercial and residential roofing, the most important factor is choosing the right type for your project. Whether building a new commercial property or renovating a residential home, working with a professional roofing company that can provide expert advice and high-quality services is essential. With the right roofing, you can ensure your project’s safety, longevity, and overall success.

 

City Roofing & Exteriors consistently takes pride in serving Calgarians. At City Roofing, we understand the importance of customer satisfaction. We put safety, quality work and on time delivery as our top priority. We work hard to assist our customers in providing proper roofing systems to meet their budget and needs. We offer completed roofing services in Calgary and area on both residential and commercial projects. We guarantee that you will be satisfied with our work and recommend City Roofing as your roofing consultant and contractor. Give us a call at 403-608-9933 or send an email to info@calgarycityroofing.com.
